Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants a Python dictionary representing the Log Skeleton for a specific order fulfillment process The dictionary must have keys equivalence always before always after never together activ freq directly follows

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Activity Codes RO Receive Order CA Check Availability RI Reserve Items PI Pick Items QC Quality Check PO Pack Order GSL Generate Shipping Label D Dispatch IC Invoice Customer RP Record Payment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: RO starts the process RO to CA Receive Order is followed by Check Availability

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Lets assume the standard flow RO to CA to RI to PI to QC to PO to GSL to D

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Payment might happen earlier or later Invoice Customer might happen after Dispatch or before

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Lets look at standard order fulfillment RO CA RI PI QC PO GSL D IC RP

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Activity Occurrences Usually 1 time each for a single order RO 1 CA 1 RI 1 PI 1 QC 1 PO 1 GSL 1 D 1 IC 1 RP 1

Name: Validation - PE
Text: When a new customer order arrives it must be processed This implies a successful process So all activities occur exactly once

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Lets assume IC happens after D and RP happens after IC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So directly follows RO CA CA RI RI PI PI QC QC PO PO GSL GSL D D IC IC RP

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Since they are directly followed they are also always after Transitivity applies

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Equivalence Empty set Or maybe PO GSL if they are tightly coupled No Never Together Empty set

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Wait check definitions Always Before If the first activity occurs then the second activity should have been executed previously

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: My previous list for always before had RO CA meaning RO occurred CA was executed previously No RO is first So CA RO means if CA occurs RO was executed previously

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So always before should be pairs Later Earlier and for chain A to B to C always before B A and C A and C B always after A B and A C and B C directly follows A B and B C

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Chain RO to CA to RI to PI to QC to PO to GSL to D to IC to RP

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This seems correct based on the standard interpretation of the process description
